title: 假設語氣（與現在相反）If + S + V-ed...

formulas.formula: If + S + V-ed/were, S + would/could/might + V
formulas.zh: 如果現在/未來的情況不同，結果會怎樣（與事實相反的假設）
省略 if 時的倒裝形式，were 置於句首

explanation: 此句型表達與現在或未來事實相反的假設。If 子句必須用過去式表示假設性，其中 be 動詞（無論單複數）一律用 were；主句用 would/could/might + 原形動詞表示假設結果。Would 表示確定後果，could 表可能性，might 表或然率。若 if 省略，需將 were 移到句首形成倒裝。此句型常用於表達遺憾、建議、假設情景。

examples.eng: If I were you, I would not make the same mistake again.
examples.chi: 如果我是你，我就不會再犯同樣的錯誤。

examples.eng: If he studied harder, he could pass the exam without difficulty.
examples.chi: 如果他更努力讀書，他就能輕鬆通過考試。

examples.eng: Were the weather better tomorrow, we might go on a picnic.
examples.chi: 如果明天天氣更好，我們或許能去野餐。

examples.eng: If you had more free time, what would you do with it?
examples.chi: 如果你有更多空閒時間，你會用它做什麼？

extension.tip: 區分第二條件句（與現在/未來相反）與第三條件句（與過去相反）：第二條件句用 V-ed；第三條件句用 had + V-pp。常見錯誤是在 if 子句誤用 would，應在 if 子句用過去式，only 在主句用 would/could/might。

examples.test: ✗ If he would study harder, he would pass.
examples.result: → ○ If he studied harder, he would pass. （if 子句不用 would）

examples.test: ✗ If I was you, I would help.
examples.result: → ○ If I were you, I would help. （be 動詞一律用 were，不用 was）

examples.test: ✗ Were she rich, she could buy a house yesterday.
examples.result: → ○ If she had been rich, she could have bought a house. （過去事實用第三條件句）

extension.note: 記住：「If 子句過去式，主句 would/could/might」是第二條件句的核心，be 動詞永遠用 were。

parts: more time, I would complete this project today.
exercises.sentence: If I had more time, I would complete this project today.
exercises.translation: 如果我有更多時間，我今天就會完成這個項目。

parts: she not afraid of heights, she could become a pilot.
exercises.sentence: Were she not afraid of heights, she could become a pilot.
exercises.translation: 如果她不怕高，她就能成為飛行員。

parts: the truth, his parents would be disappointed.
exercises.sentence: If he told the truth, his parents would be disappointed.
exercises.translation: 如果他說出真相，他的父母會很失望。

exercises.sentence: If you studied abroad, you could gain valuable international experience.
exercises.translation: 如果你在國外讀書，你就能獲得寶貴的國際經驗。

vocab_table.zh: be 動詞過去式（用於假設）
助動詞，表確定的假設結果
助動詞，表能力上的可能結果
助動詞，表或然率較低的假設結果

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的假設語氣表達，表示與現在事實相反的情況
mc_exercises.question_eng: If I _______ more time, I would finish this project today.
mc_exercises.explanation: 假設語氣與現在相反，if 子句須用過去式。正確答案為 had（過去簡單式）。A 項現在式用法錯誤；C 項是完成式，適用過去假設；D 項分詞形式不符文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 關於 be 動詞在假設語氣中的用法，選擇最適當的選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: If she _______ you, she would make a different choice in that situation.
mc_exercises.explanation: 假設語氣中，be 動詞無論單複數一律用 were。C 項正確。A 項現在式；B 項過去式但應為 were；D 項主句形式，不應出現在 if 子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷主句中表達假設結果的適當助動詞，表示可能性或或然率
mc_exercises.question_eng: If you studied harder, you _______ pass the exam without any difficulty next week.
mc_exercises.explanation: 題目強調 "without any difficulty"（毫無困難），表達確定的可能性，should 用 could。A 項 would 過於絕對；C 項 might 表或然率不足；D 項 will 為直述語氣，不符假設。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 運用省略 if 的倒裝假設語氣，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ I not so busy with my current projects, I _______ volunteer for this charity event.
mc_exercises.explanation: 若省略 if，需將 were 倒裝至句首：Were I...。主句應用 would 表確定結果。A 項正確。B 項保留 if 與倒裝矛盾；C 項 Had 用於完成假設；D 項 should 與 will 皆不符。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果我昨天沒有熬夜，我今天就不會那麼累。
translation_exercises.answer: If I hadn't stayed up late yesterday, I wouldn't be so tired today. / If I didn't stay up late yesterday, I wouldn't be so tired today.
key_points: 表達與現在事實相反的假設
hints: 提示1：主句用 would + be + 形容詞，表示確定的假設結果
提示2：注意『昨天熬夜』是過去事實，但『現在很累』是現在狀態，可用過去簡單式或過去完成式表達if子句

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果你是我，你會接受這份工作邀請嗎？
translation_exercises.answer: If you were me, would you accept the job offer?
key_points: 第一人稱或第三人稱單數be動詞一律用were
hints: 提示1：be 動詞在假設語氣中無論何種人稱都用 were，此為必須記住的例外
提示2：疑問句需將 would 前移至句首，變成『If you were me, would...?』的語序

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果我們有充足的時間和資金，我們可能會實現這個環保計畫。
translation_exercises.answer: If we had sufficient time and funding, we could realize / carry out this environmental protection project.
key_points: If + S + had (充足的時間和資金)
could + V (表可能性，非確定性)
sufficient time and funding / adequate resources
hints: 提示1：could 表示理論上的可能性或能力，比 would 的確定性低；might 則表更低的或然率
提示2：『充足的』可用 sufficient 或 adequate，『實現計畫』可用 carry out 或 implement，選詞需符合正式用語

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 倘若不是因為疫情打亂了我們的計畫，我們早就完成這個專題研究，現在也不會面臨這麼大的壓力。
translation_exercises.answer: Were it not for the pandemic disrupting our plan, we would have completed this research project by now, and we wouldn't be facing such great pressure.
key_points: Were it not for + N (倒裝結構)
wouldn't be + V-ing (現在進行的狀態)
複雜的假設情景結合過去與現在
hints: 提示1：『倘若不是因為』可用 If it were not for 或倒裝形式 Were it not for，倒裝時 were 移到句首
提示2：當假設涉及過去已發生的事(完成專題)和現在的結果(面臨壓力)時，if子句用過去式，主句中『已完成』用 would have + V-ed，『現在面臨』用 would be + V-ing
